query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_professors,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.research_field) as unique_fields,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ufi.research_field_name) as fields_with_images,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ufi.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as professors_without_images
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images ufi 
  ON p.research_field = ufi.research_field_name 
  AND ufi.university_name = 'University of Washington'
WHERE p.university_name = 'University of Washington';

  COUNT(*) as total_professors,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.research_field) as unique_fields,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ufi.research_field_name) as fields_with_images,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ufi.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as professors_without_images
FROM professors p
LEFT JOIN university_field_images ufi 
  ON p.research_field = ufi.research_field_name 
  AND ufi.university_name = 'University of Washington'
WHERE p.university_name = 'University of Washington';
